channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Economy
channel.description: Daily Zimbabwe economy briefing — one analytical infographic per day rotating through GDP, trade, remittances, mining, services, and the unrecorded balance. All data from ZimStat and the Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe.

item.title: Zim secondary income 2025 Q4: $169M. Trailing four quarters: $2.5B.
item.description: Net secondary income — remittances plus NGO and donor flows minus outbound transfers — reached $169M in 2025 Q4, with a trailing-four-quarter total of $2.5B. Full briefing: mutapatimes.com/economy #Zimbabwe #Economy #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
